debug_info.goal:
case inr
Hist : History
L R : List Formula
nlf : NegLoadFormula
tab : Tableau Hist (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf))
s : PathIn tab.flip
s_in :
  s ∈
    if (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf))).isLoaded = true then
      @exitsOf.match_2 (List.map Sequent.flip Hist) (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)))
        (fun tab => List (PathIn tab)) tab.flip (fun lpr => [])
        (fun nrep nbas lt next =>
          List.flatMap
            (fun x =>
              @exitsOf.match_1 (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf))) lt
                (fun x => List (PathIn (Tableau.loc nrep nbas lt next))) x fun Y Y_in =>
                List.map (PathIn.loc Y_in)
                  (exitsOf (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist) Y (next Y Y_in)))
            (endNodesOf lt).attach)
        fun Y nrep bas r next =>
        List.map PathIn.pdl (exitsOf (Sequent.flip (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: List.map Sequent.flip Hist) Y next)
    else [PathIn.nil]
⊢ ⋯ ▸ s.flip ∈
    if Sequent.isLoaded (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) = true then
      @exitsOf.match_2 Hist (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) (fun tab => List (PathIn tab)) tab (fun lpr => [])
        (fun nrep nbas lt next =>
          List.flatMap
            (fun x =>
              @exitsOf.match_1 (L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) lt (fun x => List (PathIn (Tableau.loc nrep nbas lt next))) x
                fun Y Y_in => List.map (PathIn.loc Y_in) (exitsOf ((L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: Hist) Y (next Y Y_in)))
            (endNodesOf lt).attach)
        fun Y nrep bas r next => List.map PathIn.pdl (exitsOf ((L, R, some (Sum.inr nlf)) :: Hist) Y next)
    else [PathIn.nil]

failed_attempts:
sorry
      · rcases lr_nlf_Y with (nlfY|nlfY)
        · simp [Sequent.flip] at *
          unfold Sequent.flip at e e_in
          simp at e e_in
          unfold Olf.flip at e e_in
          simp at e e_in
          have := endNodesOf_flip Yf_in
          simp only [Sequent.flip_flip] at this
          refine ⟨(LY, RY, some _), this, ?_⟩
          use (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip)
          constructor
          · have IH := mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in
            grind
          · sorry
        · sorry
    case pdl Y bas r nrep next =>
      simp_all only [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Option.map_some, Sum.swap_inr, Tableau.flip,
        Sequent.isLoaded, decide_true, ↓reduceIte, List.mem_map, Sum.swap_inl]
      rcases s_in with ⟨e, e_in, def_s⟩
      subst def_s
      rcases Y with ⟨LY, RY, (_|lr_nlf_Y)⟩
      · unfold exitsOf at ⊢ e_in
        simp [Sequent.isLoaded] at *
        subst e_in
        sorry
      · have IH := mem_existsOf_of_flip e e_in
        use (PathIn_type_flip_flip ▸ e.flip), IH
        simp
        sorry
    case lrep =>
      simp [Sequent.isLoaded, Sequent.flip, Olf.flip] at *
      simp_all [Tableau.flip]

case loc nbas lt nrep next =>
      simp only [Sequent.flip, Olf.flip, Option.map_some, Sum.swap_inr, Tableau.flip,
        Sequent.isLoaded, decide_true, ↓reduceIte, List.mem_flatMap, List.mem_attach, List.mem_map,
        true_and, Subtype.exists, Sum.swap_inl] at *
      rcases s_in with ⟨Yf, Yf_in, e, e_in, def_s⟩
      rcases exists_flip_of_endNodesOf Yf_in with ⟨Y, def_Yf, Y_in⟩
      subst def_Yf def_s
      rcases Y with ⟨LY, RY, (_|lr_nlf_Y)⟩
      · simp [Sequent.flip] at e
        simp_all [Sequent.flip]
        rw! (castMode := .all) [Olf.flip_none] at e_in; simp at e_in
        rw [LocalTableau.flip_flip] at Y_in
        refine ⟨ (LY,RY,none), Y_in, .nil, ?_, ?_⟩
        · unfold exitsOf; simp [Sequent.isLoaded]
        · unfold exitsOf at e_in; simp [Sequent.isLoaded] at e_in; subst e_in
          unfold PathIn.flip; simp; unfold PathIn.flip; simp; sorry
      · rcases lr_nlf_Y with (nlfY|nlfY)
